summary: Tested both backend (14/14 pytest tests passing) and frontend (Home, Experience page, Inquiry form, AI Concierge, WhatsApp CTA, Admin login/dashboard/signout). Found one CRITICAL backend/integration bug: POST /api/leads returns 500 when optional date fields are submitted as empty strings; otherwise the platform is functional end-to-end.

critical.issue: Returns 500 when preferred_travel_end (or any unfilled optional date) is submitted as empty string ''. Supabase error: "invalid input syntax for type date: ''". The frontend InquiryForm sends '' for unfilled optional dates because the React state defaults to '' and the backend's exclude_none=True does not strip empty strings. This blocks normal inquiry submissions where the user only fills the start date.

ui_bugs.issue: Sends empty strings for optional date/text fields instead of null; coerce empty strings to null before POST (especially preferred_travel_end) to avoid backend 500.

Lead cards do not expose data-testid='lead-card-{id}' and the side detail panel has no data-testid (e.g., 'lead-detail'); review_request expected these for automation. Status pills also lack data-testid.

integration_issues.issue: Form transitions through all 4 steps correctly, but final POST fails with 500 because of the empty-string-date bug. data-testid='inquiry-error' is rendered as expected.

issues: Cream-on-dark contrast is intentional and good; navbar 'Pride Vacations' brand is legible on both dark hero and light cream sections.

action_items: FIX (high): In /app/frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.jsx submit(), convert empty-string optional fields to null before POST. Minimal patch: build payload by mapping (v) => v === '' ? null : v, especially for preferred_travel_start / preferred_travel_end. Alternatively in backend /api/leads, coerce '' to None for date fields before insert.

ADD data-testid to admin lead cards (`lead-card-${lead.id}`), side detail container (`lead-detail`), and status pills (`lead-status-pill`) in /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.jsx for automation coverage.
Optional: For idempotency, treat all '' values from the multi-step form as None in the backend LeadCreate model via a Pydantic validator.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/leads uses exclude_none=True but the frontend sends '' (empty string) for unfilled optional dates → 500. Either the FE must null-ify, or BE must add a pre-validator stripping empty strings.
supabase client and Supabase auth verification are sync-blocking calls inside async-friendly FastAPI; for low traffic this is fine but consider asyncio.to_thread for high-volume admin endpoints.

CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is a non-spec configuration browsers will reject for credentialed requests; acceptable here because no cookies are used, but worth tightening to the preview/prod origin.
AdminDashboard.jsx missing data-testid hooks on dynamic lead list reduces testability.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% — all UI flows render & navigate, only inquiry submission fails due to BE 500

test_credentials: Admin: team@zenuratech.online / pridevacationsWTF (verified working). /app/memory/test_credentials.md was empty — flagged.
seed_data_creation: Did NOT seed new data; existing Supabase rows already had 3 experiences, 3 stories, 1 admin user. Pytest created 1 TEST_ lead and the UI attempt produced no lead (500). The dashboard now lists 2 leads (TEST_Backend Tester + the prior Test User).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers experiences (list, by-slug, 404), stories, leads (create + persistence + invalid email), admin (token required, bad token, list, update status, list experiences), concierge multi-turn. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Supabase admin token is fetched directly via password grant in the test fixture using the anon key embedded in backend/.env. After the main agent fixes the empty-string-date bug, re-run the InquiryForm Playwright flow with start date only to confirm 201.
rca_of_the_issue: Reproduction: POST /api/leads with body {full_name:'x', email:'a@b.c', preferred_travel_start:'2026-04-15', preferred_travel_end:''} → 500. Backend log shows postgrest APIError code 22007 "invalid input syntax for type date: ''". Root cause: frontend InquiryForm.jsx initializes preferred_travel_end:'' and POSTs the spread of `data` which keeps the empty string; backend uses LeadCreate.model_dump(exclude_none=True) which leaves '' intact. Postgres date column rejects ''. Mitigation: in InquiryForm.submit(), build payload as Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(data).map(([k,v]) => [k, v === '' ? null : v])) (and similarly handle the destinations split). Or add a Pydantic validator in LeadCreate that coerces '' → None for date/optional str fields.
